channel.title: Posts on Fr0mars' Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Fr0mars' Blog

item.title: Kalmar CTF 2024 - Crypto
item.description: I participated to the KalmarCTF 2024 with team LSE (https://ctftime.org/team/757) and managed to do two crypto challenges with the help of my teammates : Cracking the Casino and Re-Cracking The Casino. Cracking The Casino We are given two source files for this challenge : casino.py and Pedersen-commitments.py. casino.py: #!/usr/bin/python3 from Pedersen_commitments import gen, commit, verify # I want to host a trustworthy online casino! # To implement blackjack and craps in a trustworthy way i need verifiable dice and cards!

item.title: First Post
item.description: Hello there! I will be posting on this blog writeups of CTF challenges and maybe write about topics that I find interesting.
